adminNote:
SKIPPED 2026-05-25 v2 - IKEA Cloudflare blocks both dev AND prod worker IPs.

EVIDENCE: First scrape ~4.5min/1 job (analyzer config). Second (correct config restored): 16s/0 jobs - worker fetch returned IKEA 404 SPA shell. Third after 4min cooldown: 16s/0 jobs - block lasts hours. User confirmed site loads fine in residential browser; routing differential is purely IP-class (datacenter ASNs get 404, residential gets the Yii2 jobs page).

CONFIG IS CORRECT and in place. itemSelector='.job-wrapper' picks all 115 listing-DOM rows. 6 listing-side fields (title/location/department/jobScope/detailUrl/externalJobId) populate 5/5 when worker reaches the page. pageFlow has the canonical Select-All URL.

BLOCKER: IKEA CF bot-detects datacenter IPs and returns 404 for /il/he/webapp-local/work-with-us/* paths. Worker gets 1-2 successful scrapes per fresh IP then blocked for hours. The 115 detail-page navs/scrape burn the rate limit and trigger the next block, so this site is hostile to single-IP scrapers visiting detail pages.

REVIVE OPTIONS (worker changes needed):
1. Throttle detail navs to <=1 req/2sec OR skip detail pages and only collect listing fields (smallest unblock; ~115 jobs/run, no description).
2. Route IKEA traffic through residential-IP proxy pool (most reliable).
3. Load detail URLs as iframe sub-resources (Sec-Fetch-Dest=iframe + parent session cookies) - required if description/applicationInfo wanted.

Leave SKIPPED until any of (1)/(2)/(3) ships.
